name: JoAi: Update Character

description.en: Update your agent's name, system prompt, or bio to shape how it thinks, talks, and presents itself.
description.de: Aktualisiere den Namen, System-Prompt oder die Bio deines Agenten, um zu bestimmen, wie er denkt, kommuniziert und sich präsentiert.
description.es: Update your agent's name, system prompt, or bio to shape how it thinks, talks, and presents itself.
description.fr: Update your agent's name, system prompt, or bio to shape how it thinks, talks, and presents itself.
description.ro: Update your agent's name, system prompt, or bio to shape how it thinks, talks, and presents itself.
description.it: Update your agent's name, system prompt, or bio to shape how it thinks, talks, and presents itself.

bot: Use this to change the agent's personality, system instructions, or display name. Only fill fields the user explicitly wants to change.

inputs.bot: A new display name for this agent, if the user wants to rename it.

inputs.name: System Prompt

description.en: Core instructions that define how the agent behaves
description.de: Kernanweisungen, die das Verhalten des Agenten definieren
description.es: Core instructions that define how the agent behaves
description.fr: Core instructions that define how the agent behaves
description.ro: Core instructions that define how the agent behaves
description.it: Core instructions that define how the agent behaves

inputs.bot: The system prompt that shapes the agent's behavior, tone, and capabilities. Only update if the user explicitly wants to change it.

inputs.name: Bio

description.en: A short description or bio for the agent
description.de: Eine kurze Beschreibung oder Bio des Agenten
description.es: A short description or bio for the agent
description.fr: A short description or bio for the agent
description.ro: A short description or bio for the agent
description.it: A short description or bio for the agent

inputs.bot: A short bio describing who this agent is and what it does.
